# Parishva Branding Studio

> Brand strategy, positioning, and business audit studio for founders confused, stuck, or switching agencies. We diagnose before we prescribe.

## Core Frameworks & Services

- [Business Audit (AAA Method)](/aaa-audit.pdf): A structured 2-day deep dive diagnosing positioning, communication, and customer acquisition.
- [Company Profile](/pbs-company-profile.pdf): Strategic foundation alignment, brand structuring, and positioning development.
- [Founder Training](/pbs-founder-training.pdf): Customized strategic training programs for founders, decision-makers, and internal teams.

## Insights & Articles

- [Why Switching Agencies Won't Fix Your Brand](/blog/switching-agencies): Why marketing agencies fail when upstream brand clarity and positioning are missing.
- [What Is a Business Audit](/blog/business-audit): A detailed look at what a business audit diagnostics covers and why you need it before marketing.
- [The Clarity Problem](/blog/clarity-problem): Understanding the difference between marketing symptoms and underlying brand clarity issues.
- [Brand Positioning Explained](/blog/brand-positioning): A guide to defining how your brand is perceived, identifying positioning failure points, and correcting them.
- [Why Your Ads Are Not Working](/blog/ads-not-working): Breaking down why burning budget on Meta/Google campaigns is usually caused by broken positioning, not the creative.
- [What Is Brand Strategy](/blog/what-is-brand-strategy): Why brand strategy is a core business decision, not visual design like logos or color palettes.
- [The School Admissions Problem](/blog/school-admissions-brand-strategy): Most schools in Hyderabad spend on admissions marketing but lose leads they should have won due to a broken brand experience.
